page_metadata.biotools__summary: Cancer Gene and Pathway Explorer (CGPE) provides a highly integrated bioinformatics webserver for investigating, analyzing, and visualizing the TCGA and GEO gene expression data. CGPE provides key interactive and customizable analysis portal
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Cancer Gene and Pathway Explorer (CGPE) provides a highly integrated bioinformatics webserver for investigating, analyzing, and visualizing the TCGA and GEO gene expression data. CGPE provides key interactive and customizable analysis portal
